title: Applicability of Code
text: Except as otherwise provided by statute, this code applies in every action before the Supreme Court or a court of appeal or superior court, including proceedings in such actions conducted by a referee, court commissioner, or similar officer, but does not apply in grand jury proceedings.

source.editorial_note: Amended by Stats. 2002, Ch. 784, Sec. 101. Effective January 1, 2003.
